---
title: "Jeanne Astier"
image: "images/photo_site_round.jpg"
favicon: images/favicon.ico
angle: 130
site: distill::distill_website
links:
  - label: '`r fontawesome::fa("envelope")`  jeanne.astier@ensae.fr'
    url: "mailto:jeanne.astier@ensae.fr"
  - label: '`r fontawesome::fa("house")`  office 4100, ENSAE Paris'
    url: "https://www.openstreetmap.org/?mlat=48.71104&mlon=2.20752#map=17/48.711040/2.207520"
output: postcards::trestles
---

I am a PhD student in <span class="dark-green-text">Economics</span> at [<span class="dark-green-text">CREST</span>](https://crest.science/) ([Institut Polytechnique de Paris](https://www.ip-paris.fr/en)), advised by [Geoffrey Barrows](https://sites.google.com/site/geoffreybarrows/) and [Florian Grosset-Touba](https://www.fgrosset.com/). 

My research lies at the intersection of <span class="light-green-text">international trade</span> and <span class="light-green-text">environmental economics</span>, with a focus on the propagation of local climate shocks. I am particularly interested in <span class="light-green-text">maritime transportation</span>.

From January to June 2026, I am visiting Berkeley Agricultural & Resource Economics department, hosted by [Thibault Fally](https://fally.are.berkeley.edu/index.html).


<br>

<span class="dark-green-text">NEW</span>: I'm thrilled to share that I will be joining Dartmouth as a Globalization Ph.D. Fellow in Fall 2026! &#127810;


<br>

<span class="dark-green-text">NEW</span>: the working paper of [Quantifying Climate Damages When Regions Trade: A Structural Gravity Approach](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=6540449
), with Geoffrey Barrows, Raphael Calel, and Hélène Ollivier, is out! 


<br>


Incoming presentations: 

<ul>
<li>[Rocky Mountain Empirical Trade Conference](https://freit.org/RMET/2026/index.php), May 15-17, Banff </li>
  <li>[15th Energy and Climate Economics Conference](https://www.tse-fr.eu/conferences/2026-15th-energy-and-climate-economics-conference?lang=en), June 4-5, Toulouse </li>
<li>[25th RIEF Doctoral Meeting](https://sites.google.com/site/riefnetwork/previous-editions/rief-paris-2026?authuser=0)- June 11-12, Université Paris-Saclay </li>
<li>[Second Paris-Saclay Conference on Trade and the Environment](https://tradeenv2026.sciencesconf.org/?lang=en)- June 15-16, AgroParisTech, Palaiseau </li>
</ul>  


<br>

<span class="grey-text"> *Credits to [Maxime Chabriel](https://maximechabriel.github.io/) for the website.* &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <a href="https://sites.google.com/view/johanne-trotin/home">←</a> &#127804; 4100 webring &#127804; <a href="https://archatelain.github.io/">→</a>  </span>
